subject: str-fpgb.6: Frontend conformance harness
description: Build a black-box protocol conformance harness that runs the same NDJSON request/response cases against each frontend subprocess (TS, Go, Rust, noop) and reports behavioral drift. Shared conformance cases must run against all frontends; protocol field mismatches fail the harness; expected dynamic fields are normalized explicitly. This is P1 and blocks str-fpgb.7 and str-fpgb.9. See `bd show str-fpgb.6` for full details.
